description:
Parent epic: V3 E5: Controls and human in the loop

Source task 5/9 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Define control execution order and short-circuit semantics.

Epic closure criteria:
- Controls are the one public policy concept
- human-in-the-loop is demonstrated without new runtime machinery
- raising controls cannot crash the agent process

comments.text: Documented control stage ordering and short-circuit semantics, and added tests proving controls run in declaration order while allow results continue, then stop later controls on block, interrupt, or error.

title: E5: Define control execution order and short-circuit semantics
